diffCoverage.notes: Focused on what leaves the core (Contact DTOs), the CSP change, and the live-smoke output.

findings.evidence: CSP img-src was widened to https://*.zadn.vn / https://*.zalo.me (Zalo avatar CDNs) so contact photos load. This is image-only; script-src stays 'self' and connect-src stays self+ipc, so no new code-execution or data-exfil channel. The contacts smoke sidecar was scanned and contains no credential values — only a contact count.
findings.fix: Keep the avatar allowlist to Zalo domains; if avatars move to a core-proxied asset later, narrow img-src back to self/asset.

findings.evidence: list_contacts requires an existing in-memory session keyed by account_id (no credentials from the UI); it returns only public Contact fields. Friend display data is treated as untrusted and rendered as text/escaped image src.
findings.fix: Continue returning only non-secret contact fields as more profile endpoints are wrapped.

summary: Security review of the contacts path: credentials stay in the core (session reused, not re-sent), only non-secret Contact DTOs cross IPC, and the attested smoke sidecar is secret-free. The CSP change is an image-only allowlist for Zalo avatar CDNs with no script/connect broadening. No blocking findings.
